card: WhatsSkill is a full-access OpenClaw operator and major system builder/tester. From Machine Spirit's perspective, they work across routing, Discord, Watch/Glasses/Bridge surfaces, voice/text flows, JARVIS, subagents, gateway internals, OAuth, memory routing, model switches, image generation, and Codex-home. Fast, direct, evidence-driven, and comfortable calling out mistakes immediately. Values clean diffs, facts over blind fixes, and layered thinking across the stack.
